title: callitriche umbonata
intro: Callitriche umbonata, also known as umbrella pondweed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Callitriche umbonata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, it has been prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, as a poultice or salve, to harness its medicinal properties.
